data.title: Students in San Diego are finding safety from bullies thanks to Learn4Life program. #bullyingpreventionmonth.
data.description: In San Diego, a program called Learn4Life is providing safety for students who are facing bullying. With approximately 30% of teenagers feeling unsafe in regular school settings, this initiative aims to offer a sense of belonging and security. By creating a supportive environment, Learn4Life is helping to address the issue of bullying during the designated Bullying Prevention Month.

data.title: Culture Pop Soda partners with musician Noah Kahan in a new collaboration. Team-up announced on Oct 24, 2025.
data.description: A collaboration has been announced between Culture Pop Soda, a Boston-based beverage brand known for its probiotic soda with real, simple ingredients and a slightly sweet taste, and Noah Kahan, a 2x Grammy-nominated musician from New England. The partnership was revealed in Watertown, Mass., with the news spreading on October 24, 2025. This alliance is expected to bring a unique blend of music and healthy refreshments to consumers, with the collaboration marking an exciting opportunity for both parties.

data.title: Taffer's Tavern expands with Florida debut in Orlando, targeting key US entertainment hubs. Founded by Jon Taffer, the full-service pub franchise offers a modern twist on old-world taverns - PRNewswire, Oct. 24, 2025.
data.description: Renowned entrepreneur Jon Taffer and Craveworthy Brands are boosting their comprehensive pub franchise tailored for bar industry enthusiasts, focusing on vital U.S. entertainment hubs. Established as Taffer's Tavern, the franchise offers a full array of services and was launched by the award-winning business personality. The development is set to target significant locations in the United States. The announcement was made in Orlando, Florida, on October 24, 2025.

data.title: VinFast partners with Food Banks Canada to donate 200,000 meals by providing 100 meals for each of 2,000 test drives.
data.description: VinFast, a prominent electric vehicle brand, has launched a partnership with Food Banks Canada to aid those in need. In a national initiative spanning from October 1 to December 15, 2025, VinFast will donate the equivalent of 100 meals to Canadian food banks for every test drive taken. The goal is to achieve 2,000 test drives, which would result in 200,000 meals being provided to food banks throughout the country. This initiative mirrors one that VinFast successfully executed in the previous year.

data.title: New mobile app from WPA Hash streamlines cloud mining, letting users earn crypto income with ease through intelligent algorithms.
data.description: A new mobile application called WPA Hash has been introduced to facilitate users in managing cloud mining and generating passive cryptocurrency income effortlessly through intelligent algorithms. The app promises to offer a seamless experience for users looking to earn through crypto, potentially appealing to a wide range of individuals interested in the space. Stay tuned for more updates on this innovative development.

data.title: Illinois Tool Works (ITW) tightens profit outlook, Q3 revenue at $4.06B, up 2.3% Y/Y. Stock falls after missing street view.
data.description: ILLINOIS TOOL WORKS INC. (NYSE: ITW) stock experienced a decline following the release of its third-quarter fiscal 2025 results and revised full-year guidance. The company reported a 2.3% year-over-year increase in revenue, amounting to $4.06 billion, which fell short of the expected $4.08 billion. Organic revenue grew by 1% in the quarter. Across segments, revenue highlights included a 7.3% growth in Automotive OEM, 2.5% in Food Equipment, 0.3% in Test & Measurement and Electronics, and 3.3% in both Welding and Specialty Products segments. Earnings per share were reported at $2.81, compared to $3.91 the previous year. For in-depth coverage, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: Inventor from Michigan creates new vacuum/carpet cleaner (OSK-1125) for thorough cleaning & disinfecting.
data.description: In Pittsburgh on October 24, 2025, a inventor from Linden, Michigan shared his motivation for creating a innovative carpet cleaning appliance. The VACUUM ELECTROLYZED WATER SYSTEM was developed to offer enhanced cleaning and disinfecting capabilities for soiled carpets. The invention aims to revolutionize the cleaning process, with a focus on safety and effectiveness. The system utilizes a unique technology to achieve its cleaning goals.

data.title: Inventor from Houston designs Dustless Drilling tool to contain & extract dust while drilling, enhancing safety.
data.description: In Pittsburgh on October 24, 2025, an inventor from Houston, Texas shared the inspiration behind their creation of Dustless Drilling. The inventor believed there was a need for a straightforward method to enclose drilling spaces to extract particles when working on drywall or boards. The innovative design allows for neat vacuuming during drilling procedures, addressing the issue of dust particles.

data.title: KuCoin to showcase innovation at Blockchain Life Dubai 2025 on Oct 28–29; focus on Web3, trading strategies.
data.description: KuCoin, a reputable international cryptocurrency platform, will be participating in Blockchain Life Dubai 2025 on October 28–29 at the Festival Arena in Providenciales, Turks and Caicos Islands. The event will focus on the evolution of Web3, trading strategies, and other significant aspects of the blockchain industry.

data.title: BTC surges to $112K on weak US CPI; S&P 500 sets new high. Volatility after CPI release, Fed rate-cut hopes boost stocks.
data.description: Bitcoin experienced fluctuations in response to the release of Consumer Price Index (CPI) data that was lower than anticipated. Despite this, Bitcoin did not track the upward trend seen in the stock market, which reached new record levels on the back of optimistic sentiment surrounding potential Federal Reserve rate cuts.

data.title: D.A. Davidson advises Palm Peak Capital in acquiring Domaille Engineering with Stellus Capital Management, raising senior secured debt.
data.description: In New York, D.A. Davidson & Co. acted as the sole financial advisor to Palm Peak Capital, LLC in acquiring Domaille Engineering. This acquisition involved securing senior secured debt financing and equity co-investment from Stellus Capital Management, LLC. D.A. Davidson’s expertise in communications technology and digital infrastructure played a crucial role in this transaction. The specifics of the financial aspect, including the amount of debt financing and equity co-investment, were not disclosed.

data.title: ECB President Lagarde warns of impending full impact of Trump tariffs on consumers. Businesses currently absorbing two-thirds of tariffs' cost, with European goods jumping from 1.5% to 13% due to tariffs. Consumers to soon feel the effects. Business margins being squeezed. Concerns raised on sustainability of absorbing costs. U.S. consumers may bear the rest. Full article on Benzinga.com.
data.description: European Central Bank President Christine Lagarde warned that American consumers are yet to feel the full impact of tariffs imposed by the Trump administration. The cost of European goods has jumped from 1.5% to 13%, with a split impact of one-third on the exporter, one-third on U.S. importers, and one-third on consumers. Businesses have been absorbing two-thirds of the cost through squeezed margins, but Lagarde questioned how long they could sustain it. Once businesses can no longer absorb the cost, consumers are expected to bear the brunt. U.S. consumers are currently paying 37% of the impact, as per a Goldman Sachs report.

data.title: EU questioned enforceability of $600 billion pledge to invest in US projects under Trump trade deal.
data.description: The trade agreement between President Donald Trump and the European Commission included a commitment to invest $600 billion in U.S. projects. However, authorities within the bloc have raised doubts about the enforceability of this pledge.

data.title: Inspira and Bites form strategic alliance to embed AI as core standard; Inspira Technologies OXY B.H.N. Ltd. collaborates with Bites Learning Ltd.
data.description: On October 22, 2025, in Ra'anana, Israel, Inspira™ Technologies OXY B.H.N. Ltd. (NASDAQ: IINN) revealed a significant partnership with Bites Learning Ltd. The collaboration involves Inspira, a groundbreaking company specializing in life-support and diagnostic technologies, and Bites, a renowned provider of AI-driven digital training and performance enhancement solutions. This strategic alliance marks a significant step in enhancing the capabilities of both companies.

data.title: Nasdaq up 1%; Procter & Gamble beats 3Q expectations, raises FY26 guidance. Dow up 0.8% to 47,108.01, Nasdaq up 1.07% to 23,187.56, S&P 500 up 0.83% to 6,794.12. Information technology stocks rose by 1.3% while materials fell by 0.3%. Procter & Gamble's Q3 adjusted EPS at $1.99 (+3% YoY), sales at $22.386 billion, raising FY26 EPS guidance to $6.83-$7.10.
data.description: This morning, U.S. stocks saw positive trading activity, with the Nasdaq Composite experiencing a 1% increase on Friday. During the market opening, the Dow rose by 0.80% to 47,108.01, while the NASDAQ climbed by 1.07% to 23,187.56. The S&P 500 also saw an increase, with a gain of 0.83% to 6,794.12. Information technology shares surged by 1.3%, whereas materials stocks dropped by 0.3% on Friday. Procter & Gamble Co. (NYSE: PG) exceeded expectations, reporting a 3% year-over-year increase in first-quarter adjusted earnings per share to $1.99, surpassing the analyst consensus of $1.90. Quarterly sales of $22.386 billion also outperformed the Street estimate of $22.175 billion. The company raised its fiscal 2026 adjusted EPS guidance to $6.83-$7.10 from $6.83-$7.09, as compared to the $6.97 analyst estimate. For more detailed information, visit the full story on Benzinga.com.
